authorityOrder: Human-reviewed approved reservation record and its source document for booked facts
Explicit reconciliation correction for demonstrably damaged or low-confidence OCR
Tracked authored itinerary for trip structure and operational planning
Operator guidance for recommendations, tickets, access, and fallbacks

matrix.authoritativeValue: Ken, Lori, Declan for display; three corresponding legal names in the private flight record
matrix.source: Travel context and Air Canada itinerary
matrix.finding: OCR initially captured only Lori; the source document contains all three travelers. Generic role labels were also present in tracked logistics.

matrix.source: Trip brief and Air Canada itinerary
matrix.finding: The itinerary has eight Switzerland calendar days. The preceding RDU/YYZ departure remains a valid inbound flight segment, not an extra itinerary day.
The importer omitted AC 8839 and assigned the wrong cabin to AC 880.

matrix.authoritativeValue: RDU → YYZ → ZRH; ZRH → YYZ → RDU
matrix.finding: Zürich Airport is the Day 1 start and Day 8 Swiss departure point.
Inbound ZRH arrival was incorrectly normalized to July 21. Times remain local to the named airport; the unified timeline projects instants to Europe/Zurich for grouping.

matrix.authoritativeValue: One verified Air Canada booking reference, one Booking.com rental number plus one Budget supplier number, and one verified number for each lodging; values stay in private approved records
matrix.finding: No confirmation number is guessed or duplicated into tracked trip JSON.

matrix.authoritativeValue: Budget at Zürich Airport; pickup 2026-07-22 12:30; return 2026-07-29 12:00; Europe/Zurich
matrix.finding: The noon return is too late for the 13:25 international flight. An earlier confirmed return or authorized early-drop procedure is unresolved.

matrix.authoritativeValue: Eigerhome - The Cottage mit Wellness - GRIWA RENT AG; check in 2026-07-22 16:00–17:00; check out 2026-07-25 08:00–10:00
matrix.finding: Tracked placeholders incorrectly put Zürich first and assigned only one Grindelwald night.

OCR read July 25 as July 4. The source visibly states Saturday July 25, four nights, checkout Wednesday July 29. The recorded 14:00–15:00 arrival estimate should be updated because of the Lucerne stop.

matrix.authoritativeValue: 10 Unter Eigerweg, 3818 Grindelwald, Switzerland; Seestrasse 319B, 8804 Au, Switzerland
matrix.finding: Both addresses are present in tracked operational data and private reservation details.

matrix.authoritativeValue: Both lodging numbers and the Budget desk number were verified from source documents and retained only in private approved records
matrix.source: Approved lodging and rental source documents
matrix.finding: The parser originally stored OCR garbage for both lodging contacts and the rental supplier.

matrix.authoritativeValue: Europe/Zurich for trip-day grouping; each flight time retains its airport-local timezone before projection
matrix.source: Tracked trip metadata and airport-local reservation facts
matrix.finding: RDU uses America/New_York, YYZ uses America/Toronto, and ZRH uses Europe/Zurich.

unresolvedFields.action: Change the Budget return from 12:00 to approximately 09:45–10:00 or obtain explicit authorized early-drop instructions.

unresolvedFields.field: Assigned rental vehicle and energy type
unresolvedFields.action: At pickup, record the exact model, fuel type, starting level, and applicable fuel or EV return rule.
Check Air Canada and Zürich Airport on July 28 and departure morning.
Notify the property that the Lucerne transfer stop makes the saved 14:00–15:00 estimate unlikely.
Use live weather, operating status, and availability before buying Jungfraujoch, Mürren, Rhine Falls boat, Lake Zürich boat, or Lindt tickets.
Store policy number, assistance phone, coverage dates, and claim instructions offline; do not commit them.
